argument: The core of the contested claim—that Max Deichmann co-founded Langfuse in 2022—can indeed be supported. The evidence from the founder application clearly states that Langfuse was founded in 2022 by Marc Klingen, Clemens Rawert, and Max Deichmann [deck]. This corroborates the accuracy of Deichmann's involvement in the founding team without suggesting he acted alone. The assertion that the role is overstated appears unfounded since the evidence provides a factual basis for his co-founding status and there are no independent third-party sources that negate his contribution. That said, I concede that the framing of the claim may imply an undue emphasis on singularity, rather than the collaborative nature of startup founding, which reflects the reality of many tech startups formed by teams rather than individuals.
